offer: For fleet operations accountants processing 10-20 invoices/month, inaccurate reconciliation causes financial discrepancies. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate reconciliation of fuel expenses leading to financial discrepancies.
